title: MLS group state reset on Reconnecting but mls_active flag not reset if create_group fails after reset
description: cli/src/commands.rs: on ClientEvent::Reconnecting, mls = MlsClient::new(&my_pub_id)? and mls_active = false are set. If MlsClient::new returns Err (unlikely but possible if the signing key generation fails), the ? propagates and the chat() function returns an error — this is the correct behavior. However if a later call to mls.create_group() fails (e.g. GroupAlreadyExists on a stale provider), mls_active remains false but mls is a new client without a group. The admin then sends no Commits, and non-admin peers waiting for a Welcome never receive one. The admin must disconnect and reconnect to recover. This is a session-stuck scenario with no UI feedback beyond a warn! log.
